title: phrygia major
intro: Phrygia major, also known as Phrygian mint or Lamiophylum phrygium, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Phrygia major include relief from digestive issues, headaches, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate menstrual cramps. The herbal preparations of Phrygia major include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which are often used to soothe wounds, calm digestive issues, and ease respiratory discomfort.
